'''Meen Burtak''' was a [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]]-addicted [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], who was known to be a smart, manipulative informant to [[Jaw-knee Rise]] and a member of the [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A bounty, 4000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive, 2000 dead, was posted on his head by [[Brine Eyes-Li]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the bounty was collected on Malastare by the deadly [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
